'''Pleck''' was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and was an agent with the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]]. He was sent to serve on board the ''[[Glorious]]'' under [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ejagga Pakkpekatt]] in the search for the [[Teljkon Vagabond]]. After a failed attempt to capture the Vagabond, Pleck volunteered to aide Pakkpekatt in his search for [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]].

{{Char-stub}}
